title: Section 2
content: (1) Notwithstanding any provision in any enactment or any rule of law for the time being in force to the contrary, no transfer (whether made before or after the commencement of this Act) of a Post Office 5-year Cash Certificate shall be valid without the previous consent in writing of 1[an officer of the Post Office authorised by general or special order of the Central Government in that behalf]. (2) In this section "transfer" means a transfer infer vivos and does not include a transfer by operation of law.
footnote: 1. Subs. by Act 32 of 1920, s. 2, for certain words with effect from 1 -7-1965.
